summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stockholm bus search app. All core functionality working excellently with real Trafiklab API integration.

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Returns results with global_id as required
✅ Working - Trip planning with global IDs returns trip alternatives

passed_tests: Search autocomplete shows results when typing 'slussen' (4 results)
Clicking search result shows departures board with 30 departures
Line numbers and times displayed correctly with colored badges
Favorite star toggle works and persists in localStorage
Trip planner tab accessible and functional
Trip planner submission returns 4 trip alternatives
Trip results show departure/arrival times and line numbers
Dark theme properly implemented throughout UI
Real-time departures showing 'Nu' (Now) for immediate departures
Smart search finds T-Centralen variants (tc → Tcentralen)
Backend API integration fully functional with Trafiklab APIs
